Value: Nightshade, Capsaicin, MSG, Allium (Garlic, Onion), Soy
In a fryer preheated to ~350°F, drop cauliflower into fry basket and fry for 3-5 minutes
Once golden, cripsy, and heated thoroughly remove from fryer and drain excess oil
Transfer to medium mixing bowl and toss with Vegan Spicy Mayo
Transfer to Caulilfower Plate lined with bamboo leaf trapezoid
